mapper.insert:
SELECT "seq_board_no".NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "board" ("board_no", "board_type_no", "title", "board_content", "writer", "created_dt", "delete_flag") VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{boardTypeNo}, #{title}, #{boardContent}, #{writer}, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", b."board_content" AS boardContent, u."name" AS writerName, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, b."delete_flag" AS deleteFlag, NVL(COUNT(l."like_no"), 0) AS likeCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN "likes" l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" AND l."target_type" = 'board' WHERE b."board_no" = #{boardNo} AND b."delete_flag" = 0 GROUP BY b."board_no", b."board_type_no", b."title", b."board_content", u."name", b."created_dt", b."delete_flag"

SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", b."board_content" AS boardContent, u."name" AS writerName, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, b."delete_flag" AS deleteFlag, NVL(COUNT(l."like_no"), 0) AS likeCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN "likes" l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" AND l."target_type" = 'board' WHERE b."delete_flag" = 0 GROUP BY b."board_no", b."board_type_no", b."title", b."board_content", u."name", b."created_dt", b."delete_flag" ORDER BY b."board_no" DESC OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", b."board_content" AS boardContent, u."name" AS writerName, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, b."delete_flag" AS deleteFlag, NVL(COUNT(l."like_no"), 0) AS likeCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN "likes" l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" AND l."target_type" = 'board' WHERE b."delete_flag" = 0
AND b."title" LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
GROUP BY b."board_no", b."board_type_no", b."title", b."board_content", u."name", b."created_dt", b."delete_flag" ORDER BY b."board_no" DESC OFFSET (#{pageRequest.page} - 1) * #{pageRequest.size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageRequest.size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "board" WHERE "delete_flag" = 0
AND "title" LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'

SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", b."board_content" AS boardContent, u."name" AS writerName, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, b."delete_flag" AS deleteFlag, NVL(COUNT(l."like_no"), 0) AS likeCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN "likes" l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" AND l."target_type" = 'board' WHERE b."delete_flag" = 0 GROUP BY b."board_no", b."board_type_no", b."title", b."board_content", u."name", b."created_dt", b."delete_flag" ORDER BY likeCount DESC, b."board_no" DESC FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_dt) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_dt) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM "board" WHERE delete_flag = 0 GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_dt), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_dt) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC
